_doc: Allowlist for yarn audit high/critical advisories that cannot be fixed in the current branch. Every entry needs a reason and a review date. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md §6.

_fields.id: npm advisory numeric ID (from `yarn audit --json` advisory.id)
_fields.ghsa: GitHub Security Advisory ID, for humans — not used for matching
_fields.reason: why the advisory is allowlisted — upstream has no fix, major version bump deferred, not on a reachable code path, etc.
_fields.added: YYYY-MM-DD when the entry was added
_fields.review: YYYY-MM-DD by which the entry must be re-evaluated. An expired entry prints a CI warning but does not fail the job.
